title: No output from Extract from File node with Google Docs
symptom: The Extract from File node returns no output data when processing a Google Doc downloaded in HTML format.
not_this_if: Output data is returned when using other file types
root_cause: The Extract from File node is designed to extract structured tables from files. Since Google Docs typically contain plain text without structured tables, the node fails to return any data.
fix_steps: Replace the Extract from File node with the HTML node
Set the source to 'Binary File' and use the property name 'data'
Use 'body' as the CSS selector to grab all text from the document
agent_instruction: Replace the Extract from File node with the HTML node and configure it to read the Google Doc content.
